query:
SELECT 'blocos' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM blocos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'macros' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM macros
UNION ALL
SELECT 'micros' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM micros;
